info.title: Bookstore API
info.description: The **Books API** - allows searching of books from the book catalog as well as retrieving the specific details on a selected book. Once you find the book you are looking for, you can make an order.

get.summary: Get a list of books based on the provided criteria
get.description: This API method supports searching the book catalog based on book title or author name

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title (or partial title) of a book

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: The author name (or partial author name)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of books to return

400.description:
The request was malformed or could not be processed. 

Examples of `Bad Request` problem detail responses:

 - [Missing request parameter](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/missing-request-parameter/)     
 - [Invalid request parameter format](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-request-parameter-format/)
 - [Invalid request parameter value](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-request-parameter-value/)

post.description: This API method allows placing an order for one or more books

books.description: The books that are part of the order

deliveryAddress.description: The address to deliver the order to

Book.description: The schema object for a Book

title.example: Designing APIs with Swagger and OpenAPI

items.description: A string containing an author's name

ErrorDetail.description: An object to provide explicit details on a problem towards an API consumer.

detail.description: A granular description on the specific error related to a body property, query parameter, path parameters, and/or header.

pointer.description: A JSON Pointer to a specific request body property that is the source of error.

parameter.description: The name of the query or path parameter that is the source of error.

header.description: The name of the header that is the source of error.

code.description: A string containing additional provider specific codes to identify the error context.

Errors.description: An array of error details to accompany a problem details response.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It should not change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for purposes of localization.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

code.description: An API specific error code aiding the provider team understand the error based on their own potential taxonomy or registry.

Unauthorized.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

ServerError.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

BadRequest.description:
The request was malformed or could not be processed. 

Examples of `Bad Request` problem detail responses:

 - [Missing body property](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/missing-body-property/)
 - [Invalid body property format](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-body-property-format/)
 - [Invalid body property value](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-body-property-value/)
 - [Missing request header](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/missing-request-header/)
 - [Invalid request header format](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-request-header-format/)
 - [Missing request parameter](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/missing-request-parameter/)         
 - [Invalid request parameter format](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-request-parameter-format/)
 - [Invalid request parameter value](https://problems-registry.smartbear.com/invalid-request-parameter-value/)

value.title: Service Unavailable
value.detail: The service is currently unavailable

license-expired.description: Representation of a 503 Service Unavailable response when the license associated with the client has expired thus rendering the service unavailable.

value.title: License Expired
value.detail: The service is unavailable as the license associated with your client or organization has expired. Please contact your account manager or representative.

license-cancelled.description: Representation of a 503 Service Unavailable response when the license associated with the client has been cancelled thus rendering the service unavailable.

value.title: License Cancelled
value.detail: The service is unavailable as the license associated with your client or organization has been cancelled. Please contact your account manager or representative.

validation-error.description:
This problem occurs when the request is deemed unprocessable.

The client issued a request that failed validation. Certain validation libraries return multi-errors and cannot be easily parsed into discreet types. This problem type, afforded the provider with the ability to surface all validation errors and negate the need for a trial and error workflow on your side.

value.title: Validation Error
value.detail: The request is invalid.

errors.detail: Your request does not contain the required property {name}
The path parameter does not conform to the expected format
